offer: For property managers processing 5–15 utility invoices/month, inefficient manual report generation causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual spreadsheet tracking.
problem: Inefficient manual report generation for utility expenses
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property managers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
